query:
SELECT m.status, m.fromMe, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM messages m
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT remoteJid, MAX(id) AS maxId
  FROM messages
  WHERE sessionId LIKE 'crm-%'
  AND remoteJid NOT LIKE '%@g.us'
  AND remoteJid != 'status@broadcast'
  GROUP BY remoteJid
) latest ON m.remoteJid = latest.remoteJid AND m.id = latest.maxId
GROUP BY m.status, m.fromMe
ORDER BY cnt DESC
